message.queued.description: Triggered when an outbound SMS/MMS message is queued for delivery

message.sent.description: Triggered when an outbound SMS/MMS message is sent to the carrier

message.delivered.description: Triggered when an outbound SMS/MMS message is confirmed delivered to the recipient

message.undelivered.description: Triggered when an outbound SMS/MMS message could not be delivered to the recipient

message.failed.description: Triggered when an outbound SMS/MMS message fails to send

message.received.description: Triggered when an inbound SMS/MMS message is received on a Twilio number

call.initiated.description: Triggered when an outbound call is initiated

call.ringing.description: Triggered when an outbound call starts ringing at the destination

call.answered.description: Triggered when a call is answered by the recipient

call.completed.description: Triggered when a call ends normally after being answered

call.busy.description: Triggered when a call receives a busy signal from the recipient

call.failed.description: Triggered when a call fails to connect

recording.completed.description: Triggered when a call recording is completed and available

conference.start.description: Triggered when a conference call begins (first participant joins)

conference.end.description: Triggered when a conference call ends (last participant leaves)

AccountSid.description: The Twilio Account SID that sent the message

From.description: The phone number or sender ID that sent the message (E.164 format)

Body.description: The text body of the message

MessageStatus.description: The current status of the message: queued, sent, delivered, undelivered, or failed

SmsSid.description: Same as MessageSid, included for backward compatibility

SmsStatus.description: Same as MessageStatus, included for backward compatibility

ErrorCode.description: The error code if the message failed or was undelivered (e.g. 30001)

ErrorMessage.description: Human-readable description of the error, if applicable

MessageSid.description: Unique identifier for the inbound message

AccountSid.description: The Twilio Account SID that received the message

From.description: The phone number that sent the message (E.164 format)

To.description: The Twilio phone number that received the message (E.164 format)

Body.description: The text body of the received message

NumMedia.description: The number of media items (images, etc.) included in the message

MediaUrl0.description: The URL of the first media attachment, if any (additional media uses MediaUrl1, MediaUrl2, etc.)

MediaContentType0.description: The MIME type of the first media attachment (e.g. image/jpeg)

FromCity.description: The city of the sender, if available from carrier lookup

FromState.description: The state or province of the sender, if available

FromCountry.description: The country of the sender (ISO country code)

AccountSid.description: The Twilio Account SID associated with the call

From.description: The phone number or client identifier of the caller (E.164 format)

To.description: The phone number or client identifier being called (E.164 format)

CallStatus.description: The current status of the call: initiated, ringing, in-progress, completed, busy, failed, or no-answer

Direction.description: The direction of the call: inbound, outbound-api, or outbound-dial

CallDuration.description: The duration of the call in seconds (present only when call is completed)

Timestamp.description: The timestamp of the event in RFC 2822 format

SequenceNumber.description: The order of this status callback relative to other callbacks for this call

AccountSid.description: The Twilio Account SID that owns the recording

CallSid.description: The SID of the call that was recorded

RecordingUrl.description: The URL where the recording audio file can be accessed

RecordingDuration.description: The duration of the recording in seconds

RecordingStatus.description: The status of the recording: completed, absent, or failed

RecordingChannels.description: The number of audio channels in the recording (1 for mono, 2 for dual)

RecordingSource.description: The source of the recording: DialVerb, Conference, OutboundAPI, Trunking, RecordVerb, or StartCallRecordingAPI

AccountSid.description: The Twilio Account SID that owns the conference

FriendlyName.description: The friendly name of the conference

StatusCallbackEvent.description: The event that triggered this callback: conference-start, conference-end, participant-join, participant-leave, etc.

CallSid.description: The SID of the participant's call leg, if this event is participant-specific

Muted.description: Whether the participant is muted (true or false), if applicable

Hold.description: Whether the participant is on hold (true or false), if applicable

SequenceNumber.description: The order of this callback relative to other callbacks for this conference
